description_long: This is a well-worn, vintage-style sofa with a classic rolled-arm design and a visibly distressed, reddish-brown upholstery. The sofa features a continuous backrest and seat, both of which appear to have attached cushions that are slightly sunken and show signs of heavy use. Decorative nailhead trim runs along the front of the armrests, adding a touch of traditional elegance. The upholstery is a mix of faded and stained areas, giving the sofa a rugged, urban character suitable for outdoor or semi-sheltered environments. The armrests are thick and rounded, matching the overall robust and inviting appearance. The base of the sofa is low to the ground, and the legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure.
description: A vintage, reddish-brown sofa with rolled arms, distressed upholstery, and attached, sunken cushions. Decorative nailhead trim and a rugged, urban appearance define its style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, rolled armrest and the depth of the seat with visible wear on the upholstery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous, slightly curved backrest and the uniform, distressed fabric across the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the other rolled armrest and more visible seat wear.
description_view_3: Front view displaying both rolled armrests, the attached seat and back cushions, and the decorative nailhead trim.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single continuous seat and back cushions, both attached and slightly sunken, with uniform size and no visible segmentation.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, thick, and rounded rolled armrests at both ends, extending slightly above the seat with decorative nailhead trim along the front edge.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure beneath the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a straight top edge and attached cushion, matching the seat in wear and material.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Distressed, solid reddish-brown upholstery with visible wear, fading, and some staining; no distinct pattern but a rugged, aged texture.
